decision_rationale: no_per_pass_fps_evidence: the GRX contract requires per-pass FPS >= 0.95x baseline before any default enablement, and no full baseline or per-pass benchmark evidence exists

linear_srgb_only_subset: math parity covers only the TONEMAPPER_LINEAR + linear_to_srgb SDR subset (math_parity_evidence.json status=pending_gpu_dispatch); Reinhard/Filmic/ACES/AgX, auto exposure, glow, FXAA, BCS, color correction, debanding, multiview, and HDR output are unsupported gaps

patch_0013_writeback_is_scaffold: the LINEAR result writeback keeps the native Godot tonemapper running as continuation/backstop (it still re-renders every frame), so the opt-in Rurix dispatch yields no measured net benefit yet, and the raster-vs-compute output seam is not designed
does_not_imply: broader tonemapper mode / HDR math parity beyond the LINEAR + sRGB subset
net-benefit Rurix dispatch (patch 0013 result writeback is a scaffold; the native Godot tonemapper re-renders every frame)
